title: orbitalweapons
description: this is a orbital strike plugin but with more stuff
body:
WARNING IN SPIGOT.YML put max-tnt-per-tick to 1000000
command:
/giveos <weapon> <size>
/osweapon <weapon> <size>

perms:
Permission Node,Default,Purpose

os.admin,op,Allows access to the /giveos command to generate items.

os.stasis,true,Allows right-clicking to warp with the Stasis Rod.

os.totemstasis,true,Allows the Totem Stasis Anchor to trigger on death.

os.nuke.<size>,op,Allows launching the Orbital Strike Cannon payload.

os.railgun,op,Allows firing the high-velocity Orbital Railgun.

os.stab.<size>,op,Allows activating the Orbital Penetration Stab.

os.darkness,op,Allows casting the blinding Void Darkness Rod aura.

os.wolf.<size>,op,Allows summoning the Orbital Wolf Cannon assault packs.

os.pearl,true,Allows throwing the Ender Pearl Kinetic Drive.
 
this is a orbital strike and orbitalwolf but with more weapons
darkness:give anyone in a 10 block radius darkness
railgun:shoot a bunch of arrows
pearl:launch the pearl
stasis:when pull fishing rod get tp
totem-stasis:when popped get tp
